steps.title: Find where x = 0 on the graph
steps.content: To find $f(0)$, we need the $y$-value where the graph intersects the $y$-axis (at $x = 0$). Locate the vertical line $x = 0$—this is the $y$-axis itself.

steps.title: Read the y-coordinate at x = 0
steps.content: Trace the graph to where it crosses the $y$-axis. The curve intersects at the point $(0, 3)$, so the $y$-coordinate is \$3$. That matches choice D — D is correct.
